text:
The reason this request is made is to enable the court to determine applications concerning the child[ren].

The application for disclosure has been made [on Form C2 dated [date]] / [orally at this hearing].

This order was made at a hearing [without notice] / [on short informal notice] to [name of police force]. They have the right to apply to vary or discharge this order as set out below.

The nature of the proceedings concerning the child[ren] is as follows:

[insert]

(set out brief summary of applications, safeguarding issues raised by cafcass and parties’ positions)

The issues to be determined by the Family Court within these proceedings are as follows:

[insert]

(set out briefly what issues need to be determined within proceedings and why)

The Family Court [is considering whether] / [has determined that] it is necessary to hold a fact-finding hearing to determine the following issues between the parties which are relevant to the issues in the case:

[insert]

(set out briefly the issues the Court is considering/needs to determine at the fact-finding hearing)

The child[ren]’s current circumstances are as follows:

[insert]

(brief summary of children’s circumstances/who they live with/what intervention may have occurred/whether having contact/etc)

The court has reviewed the Family Court file and considers the following information should be disclosed by the police to resolve the issues in these family proceedings:

[insert]

(detail:

1) types of information required from police for example: pnc records; summary report or investigation reports. if the parties require investigation reports, the order must be specific in terms of the nature and date of allegation. should the court require digital/audio evidence, the parties will need to sign the undertaking attached to the Annex 1 before disclosure can be made.

2) nature of allegations which are key to these proceedings for example: domestic violence, complaints made between parties/others concerning issues/information concerning children’s involvement with police, assistance given by police to parties in relation to relevant issues;

3) timeframe for completing intelligence searches for example ‘01 january 2022 to date’)

The timetable for the Family Court proceedings is as follows:

[insert date and purpose of next hearing, timetable for filing evidence etc]

IT IS ORDERED [BY CONSENT] THAT:

(cases involving litigants in person/court ordered disclosure)

metadata.source: Standard Family Orders — Volume 2: Children and Other Orders (May 2026)
metadata.title: In the Family Court		Case No: [Case number]
